hyperedges.label: AppNavbar composed of NavLink and ThemeToggle
Overlay+Portal+Content pattern shared by Dialog, Sheet, Drawer
ChartTooltipContent and ChartLegendContent both consume ChartContext via useChart
Share token access pattern: share_tokens + get_shared_courses + get_shared_calendar enable anonymous read access to user data
courseColor exported from Index and consumed by Calendar, Shared
All tables use RLS per-user isolation pattern

nodes.label: Editorial Design System
nodes.rationale: Serif headings (DM Serif Display), mono numbers (JetBrains Mono), sans prose (Inter). CSS variables use HSL without hsl() wrapper to enable composition. Custom chart variables --chart-fatto/--chart-caricato track course progress states.

nodes.label: Protected Routes pattern
nodes.rationale: Four routes under Protected wrapper redirecting unauthenticated users to /auth. Share route is intentionally public for token-based sharing.

nodes.label: Supabase realtime subscription
nodes.rationale: Index.tsx subscribes to courses table changes via Supabase realtime. Calendar skips realtime and fetches on range change to avoid unnecessary subscriptions.

nodes.label: DB tables: courses, calendar_entries, calendar_todos, share_tokens
nodes.norm_label: db tables: courses, calendar_entries, calendar_todos, share_tokens

nodes.label: SQL: add user_id to courses + RLS
nodes.norm_label: sql: add user_id to courses + rls

nodes.label: Share token public read-only access pattern
nodes.norm_label: share token public read-only access pattern
